The front-end OS routines of NOMAD manage DC tags using PTEs and TLBs, and its back-end hardware handles data management in the DRAM cache. On a DC miss, the OS updates a tag, offloads a cache-fill command to the back-end, and immediately resumes an application thread without waiting for the cache fill to complete. Instead, the back-end hardware handles the cache fill without blocking the application thread. By decoupling tag and data management in NOMAD, a tag hit does not necessarily guarantee the presence of data in the DRAM cache. The back-end traces which DC lines are still in transfers and checks if the demanded part of a cache line has been transferred yet for every DC access. Notably, this back-end procedure does not require an OS intervention, thereby implementing a non-blocking DRAM cache. Experiment results show that NOMAD reduces application stall cycles by 76.1% and improves IPC by 16.7% over a state-of-the-art OS-managed scheme.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种 DRAM 缓存架构，该架构提供近乎理想的访问时间和非阻塞未命中处理。以前的 DRAM 缓存 (DC) 设计分为两类：基于硬件的方案和操作系统管理的方案。基于硬件的设计实现了非阻塞缓存，可以使用 MSHR 处理多个 DC 未命中，但它们在元数据管理方面存在缺陷，因为将标签存储在封装内 DRAM 中会显着增加 DC 访问的有效周期时间。 In contrast, OS-managed schemes utilize PTEs for storing tags and caching them in TLBs, which can achieve ideal DC access time.然而，它们实现了阻塞缓存，在未命中时停止应用程序线程，直到缓存填充完成。为了克服基于硬件和操作系统管理方案的局限性，本文引入了一种称为非阻塞操作系统管理 DRAM 缓存（NOMAD）的 DRAM 缓存架构。与保证标签命中时数据存在的传统缓存不同，NOMAD 将标签和数据管理解耦，以在操作系统管理的 DRAM 缓存中实现非阻塞未命中处理。 NOMAD 的前端操作系统例程使用 PTE 和 TLB 管理 DC 标签，其后端硬件处理 DRAM 缓存中的数据管理。当 DC 未命中时，操作系统会更新标签，将缓存填充命令卸载到后端，并立即恢复应用程序线程，而无需等待缓存填充完成。相反，后端硬件会在不阻塞应用程序线程的情况下处理缓存填充。通过在 NOMAD 中解耦标签和数据管理，标签命中并不一定保证 DRAM 缓存中存在数据。后端跟踪哪些 DC 线仍在传输中，并检查每次 DC 访问时缓存线的所需部分是否已传输。值得注意的是，该后端过程不需要操作系统干预，从而实现非阻塞 DRAM 缓存。实验结果表明，与最先进的操作系统管理方案相比，NOMAD 将应用程序停顿周期减少了 76.1%，并将 IPC 提高了 16.7%。

items.title: INCA: Input-stationary Dataflow at Outside-the-box Thinking about Deep Learning Accelerators.
items.abstract: This paper first presents an input-stationary (IS) implemented crossbar accelerator (INCA), supporting inference and training for deep neural networks (DNNs). Processing-in-memory (PIM) accelerators for DNNs have been actively researched, specifically, with resistive random-access memory (RRAM), due to RRAM’s computing and memorizing capabilities and device merits. To the best of our knowledge, all previous PIM accelerators have saved weights into RRAMs and inputs (activations) into conventional memories—it naturally forms weight-stationary (WS) dataflow. WS has generally been considered the most optimized choice for high parallelism and data reuse. How-ever, WS-based PIM accelerators show fundamental limitations: first, remaining high dependency on DRAM and buffers for fetching and saving inputs (activations); second, a remarkable number of extra RRAMs for transposed weights and additional computational intermediates in training; third, coarse-grained arrays demanding high-bit analog-to-digital converters (ADCs) and introducing poor utilization in depthwise and pointwise convolution; last, degraded accuracy due to its sensitivity to weights which are affected by RRAM’s nonideality. On the other hand, we observe that IS dataflow, where RRAMs retain inputs (activations), can effectively address the limitations of WS, because of low dependency by only loading weights, no need for extra RRAMs, feasibility of fine-grained accelerator design, and less impact of input (activation) variance on accuracy. But IS dataflow is hardly achievable by the existing crossbar structure because it is difficult to implement kernel sliding and preserve the high parallelism. To support kernel movement, we constitute a cell structure with two-transistor-one-RRAM (2T1R). Based on the 2T1R cell, we design a novel three-dimensional (3D) architecture for high parallelism in batch training. Our experiment results prove the potential of INCA. Compared to the WS accelerator, INCA achieves up to 20.6× and 260× energy efficiency improvement in inference and training, respectively; 4.8× (inference) and 18.6× (training) speedup as well. While accuracy in WS drops to 15% in our high-noise simulation, INCA presents an even more robust result as 86% accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 本文首先提出了一种输入平稳 (IS) 实现的交叉加速器 (INCA)，支持深度神经网络 (DNN) 的推理和训练。由于 RRAM 的计算和存储能力以及器件优点，DNN 的内存处理 (PIM) 加速器得到了积极的研究，特别是电阻式随机存取存储器 (RRAM)。据我们所知，所有以前的 PIM 加速器都将权重保存到 RRAM 中，并将输入（激活）保存到传统存储器中 - 它自然形成权重平稳 (WS) 数据流。 WS 通常被认为是高并行性和数据重用的最优化选择。然而，基于 WS 的 PIM 加速器显示出根本的局限性：首先，仍然高度依赖 DRAM 和缓冲区来获取和保存输入（激活）；其次，大量额外的 RRAM 用于转置权重和训练中的额外计算中间体；第三，粗粒度阵列需要高位模数转换器（ADC），并且在深度和逐点卷积方面利用率较差；最后，由于 RRAM 的非理想性影响其对权重的敏感性，因此降低了精度。另一方面，我们观察到，RRAM 保留输入（激活）的 IS 数据流可以有效解决 WS 的局限性，因为仅加载权重的依赖性较低，不需要额外的 RRAM，细粒度加速器设计的可行性以及输入（激活）方差对精度的影响较小。但现有的crossbar结构很难实现IS数据流，因为难以实现内核滑动并保持高并行性。为了支持内核运动，我们用二晶体管一RRAM（2T1R）构成了单元结构。基于 2T1R 单元，我们设计了一种新颖的三维 (3D) 架构，用于批量训练中的高并行性。我们的实验结果证明了 INCA 的潜力。与WS加速器相比，INCA在推理和训练方面分别实现了高达20.6倍和260倍的能效提升； 4.8×（推理）和 18.6×（训练）加速。虽然在我们的高噪声模拟中 WS 的准确度下降至 15%，但 INCA 提供了更可靠的结果，准确度为 86%。

items.title: SnakeByte: A TLB Design with Adaptive and Recursive Page Merging in GPUs.
items.abstract: This paper presents an address translation scheme in GPUs named SnakeByte that can dynamically manage variable-sized pages and maximize TLB reach by recursively merging contiguous pages. Memory virtualization has become an integral part of GPUs to enhance programmability and memory management efficiency. However, conventional memory virtualization methods using multi-level page tables and caching them in TLBs are insufficient to provide GPUs with enough address translation coverage for the massive volume of data. SnakeByte implements a hardware-based address translation mechanism that recursively merges contiguous pages into larger page groups and effectively extends TLB coverage. SnakeByte allows multiple equal-sized pages coalescing into a page table entry (PTE). It records the validity of pages to be merged using a bit vector, and few bits are annexed to indicate the size of merged pages. If all pages covered by the PTE are allocated with contiguity, the PTE is promoted to be further coalesced into a larger page group. The recursive coalescence of contiguous pages enables SnakeByte to handle variable-sized page groups with the exponentially increasing TLB reach. Associated with a contiguity-aware memory allocator, SnakeByte can consolidate vastly contiguous address spaces into a few TLB entries. Consequently, it significantly reduces TLB misses for large working sets in GPUs and achieves substantial performance improvements. Experiment results show that SnakeByte decreases the number of page table walks by 6.5x and enhances the GPU performance by 2.0x on average over the conventional paging scheme.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种名为 SnakeByte 的 GPU 中的地址转换方案，该方案可以动态管理可变大小的页面，并通过递归合并连续页面来最大化 TLB 的覆盖范围。内存虚拟化已成为 GPU 不可或缺的一部分，以增强可编程性和内存管理效率。然而，传统的使用多级页表并将其缓存在TLB中的内存虚拟化方法不足以为GPU提供足够的地址转换覆盖范围来处理海量数据。 SnakeByte 实现了基于硬件的地址转换机制，可递归地将连续页面合并为更大的页面组，并有效扩展 TLB 覆盖范围。 SnakeByte 允许多个大小相等的页面合并成一个页表条目 (PTE)。它使用位向量记录要合并的页面的有效性，并附加少量位来指示合并页面的大小。如果PTE覆盖的所有页面都被连续分配，则PTE将被提升为进一步合并成更大的页面组。连续页面的递归合并使 SnakeByte 能够处理可变大小的页面组，并且 TLB 范围呈指数增长。与连续性内存分配器相关联，SnakeByte 可以将大量连续的地址空间合并到几个 TLB 条目中。因此，它显着减少了 GPU 中大型工作集的 TLB 缺失，并实现了显着的性能改进。实验结果表明，与传统分页方案相比，SnakeByte将页表遍历次数平均减少了6.5倍，GPU性能平均提高了2.0倍。

items.title: Baryon: Efficient Hybrid Memory Management with Compression and Sub-Blocking.
items.abstract: Hybrid memory systems are able to achieve both high performance and large capacity when combining fast commodity DDR memories with larger but slower non-volatile memories in a heterogeneous way. However, it is critical to best utilize the limited fast memory capacity and slow memory bandwidth in such systems to gain the maximum efficiency. In this paper, we propose a novel hybrid memory design, Baryon, that leverages both memory compression and data sub-blocking techniques to improve the utilization of fast memory capacity and slow memory bandwidth, with only moderate metadata overheads and management complexity. Baryon reserves a small fast memory area to efficiently manage and stabilize the irregular and frequently varying data layouts resulted from compression and sub-blocking, and selectively commits only stable blocks to the rest fast memory space. It also adopts a novel dual-format metadata scheme to support flexible address remapping under such complex data layouts with low storage cost. Baryon is completely transparent to software, and works with both cache and flat schemes of hybrid memories. Our evaluation shows Baryon achieves up to 1.68× and on average 1.27× performance improvements over state-of-the-art designs.
items.abstract_zh: 当以异构方式将快速商用 DDR 存储器与更大但更慢的非易失性存储器相结合时，混合存储器系统能够实现高性能和大容量。然而，充分利用此类系统中有限的快速内存容量和慢速内存带宽以获得最大效率至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合内存设计 Baryon，它利用内存压缩和数据子块技术来提高快速内存容量和慢速内存带宽的利用率，并且仅具有适度的元数据开销和管理复杂性。 Baryon 保留一个小的快速内存区域，以有效地管理和稳定因压缩和分块而导致的不规则且频繁变化的数据布局，并有选择地仅将稳定的块提交到其余的快速内存空间。它还采用新颖的双格式元数据方案，以低存储成本支持在如此复杂的数据布局下灵活的地址重新映射。 Baryon 对软件完全透明，并且可与混合存储器的高速缓存和平面方案一起使用。我们的评估显示，与最先进的设计相比，Baryon 的性能提升高达 1.68 倍，平均提升 1.27 倍。

items.title: NvWa: Enhancing Sequence Alignment Accelerator Throughput via Hardware Scheduling.
items.abstract: Sequence alignment is the most time-consuming step in the genome analysis pipeline. Since sequence alignment generally follows the seed-and-extension paradigm, prior proposed hardware accelerators either opt to accelerate the seeding phase or the seed-extension phase. However, the diversity of each sequence in the alignment workflow leads to the pipeline stall or bubbles, which finally results in a decreased throughput for the end-to-end sequence alignment.In this paper, we propose NvWa, which is a hardware scheduling accelerator for sequence alignment. To solve the diversity problem, we propose three novel scheduling mechanisms and corresponding architecture, which target the seeding phase, the seed-extension phase, and the interaction between the two phases, respectively. For the seeding phase, we propose a Seeding Scheduler to schedule all idle seeding units in only one cycle. For the seed-extension phase, the Extension Scheduler can achieve both lower latency and higher parallelism when facing seed-extension tasks with different scales. Between the two phases, an efficient Coordinator caches and dispatches seeding hits to optimal and sub-optimal seed-extension units. Furthermore, to avoid algorithmic obsolescence for the new sequence technologies, we propose a loosely coupled design, which decouples the data path and the control scheduling path. Experimental results show that NvWa can achieve 493×, 200×, 12.11×, 2.30× speedup and 14.21×, 5.60×, 4.34×, 5.85× energy reduction when compared with a 16-thread CPU baseline, an NVIDIA A100 GPU, and two state-of-the-art accelerators, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 序列比对是基因组分析流程中最耗时的步骤。由于序列比对通常遵循种子和扩展范例，因此先前提出的硬件加速器要么选择加速种子阶段，要么选择加速种子扩展阶段。然而，对齐工作流程中每个序列的多样性会导致管道停顿或气泡，最终导致端到端序列对齐的吞吐量下降。在本文中，我们提出了NvWa，它是一种用于序列对齐的硬件调度加速器。为了解决多样性问题，我们提出了三种新颖的调度机制和相应的架构，分别针对种子阶段、种子扩展阶段以及两个阶段之间的交互。对于播种阶段，我们提出了一种播种调度程序，仅在一个周期内调度所有空闲的播种单元。对于种子扩展阶段，扩展调度器在面对不同规模的种子扩展任务时可以实现更低的延迟和更高的并行性。在这两个阶段之间，高效的协调器会缓存种子命中并将其分派给最佳和次优种子扩展单元。此外，为了避免新序列技术的算法过时，我们提出了一种松耦合的设计，它将数据路径和控制调度路径解耦。实验结果表明，与 16 线程 CPU 基准、NVIDIA A100 GPU 和两个最先进的加速器相比，NvWa 分别可以实现 493×、200×、12.11×、2.30× 的加速和 14.21×、5.60×、4.34×、5.85× 的能耗降低。

items.title: HoPP: Hardware-Software Co-Designed Page Prefetching for Disaggregated Memory.
items.abstract: Memory disaggregation is a promising direction to mitigate memory contention in datacenters. To make memory disaggregation practical, prior efforts expose remote memory to applications transparently via virtual memory subsystem’s swapping interface. However, due to the semantic gap between OS and applications – OS cannot know the memory accessing sequences of an application but via page faults. This approach has two limitations. First, it learns little from page faults’ access history, which leads to sub-optimal prefetching predictions. Second, a page fault can still occur even if there is a prefetch-hit which leads to a large kernel overhead.To address such limitations, our key insight is to decouple the address capturing from page faults by collecting full memory access traces in the memory controller. Using this idea, we build <monospace>HoPP</monospace> – a hardware-software co-designed prefetching framework. <monospace>HoPP</monospace> adds hardware modules to the memory controller to feed sufficient hot pages to OS in real-time, which has three benefits in <monospace>HoPP</monospace>’s software design: 1) it improves existing prefetching algorithms with simple revamps, also offers more insights to build better policies; 2) the prefetch algorithm can run as a separate data path alongside the normal remote data path via page faults, potentially hiding the swap latency from applications, and enabling fine-grained control over prefetching behaviors; 3) the prefetch-hit overhead can be eliminated by early page table entry (PTE) injection, i.e., inject PTE for the prefetched page as soon as it returns. We implemented a proof-of-concept prototype using commodity servers along with a hardware-based memory tracking tool called <monospace>HMTT</monospace> to emulate a modified memory controller. Results show that compared to Fastswap and Leap, <monospace>HoPP</monospace>-optimized prefetching algorithm achieves over 90% accuracy and coverage, which leads to up to 59% completion time improvement for various datacenter applications.
items.abstract_zh: 内存分解是缓解数据中心内存争用的一个有前途的方向。为了使内存分解切实可行，先前的努力通过虚拟内存子系统的交换接口将远程内存透明地公开给应用程序。然而，由于操作系统和应用程序之间的语义差距，操作系统只能通过页面错误才能知道应用程序的内存访问顺序。这种方法有两个限制。首先，它从页面错误的访问历史中学到的东西很少，这导致了次优的预取预测。其次，即使存在预取命中，页面错误仍然可能发生，这会导致大量的内核开销。为了解决这些限制，我们的关键见解是通过收集内存控制器中的完整内存访问跟踪来将地址捕获与页面错误解耦。利用这个想法，我们构建了<monospace>HoPP</monospace>——一个软硬件共同设计的预取框架。 <monospace>HoPP</monospace> 在内存控制器中添加了硬件模块，以实时向操作系统提供足够的热页，这对 <monospace>HoPP</monospace> 的软件设计有三个好处：1）它通过简单的修改改进了现有的预取算法，还提供了更多见解来构建更好的策略； 2) 预取算法可以通过页面错误作为单独的数据路径与正常的远程数据路径一起运行，从而可能对应用程序隐藏交换延迟，并实现对预取行为的细粒度控制； 3）预取命中开销可以通过早期页表项（PTE）注入来消除，即预取页一返回就注入PTE。我们使用商品服务器以及名为 <monospace>HMTT</monospace> 的基于硬件的内存跟踪工具来模拟修改后的内存控制器，从而实现了概念验证原型。结果表明，与 Fastswap 和 Leap 相比，<monospace>HoPP</monospace> 优化的预取算法实现了超过 90% 的准确率和覆盖率，从而使各种数据中心应用程序的完成时间缩短了 59%。

items.title: Duet: Creating Harmony between Processors and Embedded FPGAs.
items.abstract: The demise of Moore’s Law has led to the rise of hardware acceleration. However, the focus on accelerating stable algorithms in their entirety neglects the abundant fine-grained acceleration opportunities available in broader domains and squanders host processors’ compute power.This paper presents Duet, a scalable, manycore-FPGA architecture that promotes embedded FPGAs (eFPGA) to be equal peers with processors through non-intrusive, bi-directionally cache-coherent integration. In contrast to existing CPU-FPGA hybrid systems in which the processors play a supportive role, Duet unleashes the full potential of both the processors and the eFPGAs with two classes of post-fabrication enhancements: fine-grained acceleration, which partitions an application into small tasks and offloads the frequently-invoked, compute-intensive ones onto various small accelerators, leveraging the processors to handle dynamic control flow and less accelerable tasks; hardware augmentation, which employs eFPGA-emulated hardware widgets to improve processor efficiency or mitigate software overheads in certain execution models.An RTL-level implementation of Duet is developed to evaluate the architecture with high fidelity. Experiments using synthetic benchmarks show that Duet can reduce the processor-accelerator communication latency by up to 82% and increase the bandwidth by up to 9.5x. The RTL implementation is further evaluated with seven application benchmarks, achieving 1.5-24.9x speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 摩尔定律的消亡导致了硬件加速的兴起。然而，对整体加速稳定算法的关注忽略了更广泛领域中丰富的细粒度加速机会，并且浪费了主机处理器的计算能力。本文介绍了 Duet，一种可扩展的众核 FPGA 架构，它通过非侵入式、双向缓存一致性集成，促进嵌入式 FPGA (eFPGA) 与处理器平等。与处理器发挥支持作用的现有 CPU-FPGA 混合系统相比，Duet 通过两类制造后增强功能释放了处理器和 eFPGA 的全部潜力：细粒度加速，将应用程序划分为小任务，并将频繁调用的计算密集型任务卸载到各种小型加速器上，利用处理器处理动态控制流和加速程度较低的任务；硬件增强，它采用 eFPGA 模拟的硬件小部件来提高处理器效率或减轻某些执行模型中的软件开销。开发了 Duet 的 RTL 级实现来评估高保真度的架构。使用综合基准测试的实验表明，Duet 可以将处理器加速器通信延迟减少高达 82%，并将带宽增加高达 9.5 倍。 RTL 实现通过七个应用程序基准进行了进一步评估，实现了 1.5-24.9 倍的加速。

items.title: Trans-FW: Short Circuiting Page Table Walk in Multi-GPU Systems via Remote Forwarding.
items.abstract: Multi-GPU systems have become a popular platform to meet the ever-growing application demands. However, employing multiple GPUs does not guarantee proportional performance improvements. While prior works have extensively studied the optimizations to mitigate the non-uniform memory accesses (NUMA) overheads, the address translation process also plays an important role in shaping the overall execution performance. In this paper, we investigate the address translation process in multi-GPU systems under unified virtual memory (UVM). We specifically focus on the efficiency of page table walk and identify three major latency penalties: i) queuing for available page table walk threads, ii) memory accesses for page walk cache misses, and iii) handling page faults. Based on our observations, we propose Trans-FW, which short circuits the page table walk by leveraging substantial translation sharing and eager remote translation forwarding. Experimental results on 10 representative multi-GPU applications show that our proposed approach improves the overall performance by 53.8% on average.
items.abstract_zh: 多 GPU 系统已成为满足不断增长的应用需求的流行平台。然而，使用多个 GPU 并不能保证性能按比例提高。虽然之前的工作已经广泛研究了减轻非均匀内存访问 (NUMA) 开销的优化，但地址转换过程在塑造整体执行性能方面也发挥着重要作用。在本文中，我们研究了统一虚拟内存（UVM）下多 GPU 系统中的地址转换过程。我们特别关注页表遍历的效率，并确定三个主要的延迟损失：i）排队可用的页表遍历线程，ii）页遍历缓存未命中的内存访问，以及iii）处理页面错误。根据我们的观察，我们提出了 Trans-FW，它通过利用大量翻译共享和热切的远程翻译转发来缩短页表遍历。 10 个代表性多 GPU 应用的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法平均将整体性能提高了 53.8%。

items.title: PhotoFourier: A Photonic Joint Transform Correlator-Based Neural Network Accelerator.
items.abstract: The last few years have seen a lot of work to address the challenge of low-latency and high-throughput convolutional neural network inference. Integrated photonics has the potential to dramatically accelerate neural networks because of its low-latency nature. Combined with the concept of Joint Transform Correlator (JTC), the computationally expensive convolution functions can be computed instantaneously (time of flight of light) with almost no cost. This ‘free’ convolution computation provides the theoretical basis of the proposed PhotoFourier JTC-based CNN accelerator. PhotoFourier addresses a myriad of challenges posed by on-chip photonic computing in the Fourier domain including 1D lenses and high-cost optoelectronic conversions. The proposed PhotoFourier accelerator achieves more than 28× better energy-delay product compared to state-of-art photonic neural network accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，人们为解决低延迟和高吞吐量卷积神经网络推理的挑战做了很多工作。由于其低延迟特性，集成光子学有可能显着加速神经网络。结合联合变换相关器（JTC）的概念，计算量大的卷积函数可以在几乎没有成本的情况下即时计算（光的飞行时间）。这种“免费”卷积计算为所提出的基于 PhotoFourier JTC 的 CNN 加速器提供了理论基础。 PhotoFourier 解决了傅里叶域中片上光子计算带来的众多挑战，包括一维透镜和高成本光电转换。与最先进的光子神经网络加速器相比，所提出的 PhotoFourier 加速器的能量延迟积提高了 28 倍以上。

items.title: Tensor Movement Orchestration in Multi-GPU Training Systems.
items.abstract: As deep neural network (DNN) models grow deeper and wider, one of the main challenges for training large-scale neural networks is overcoming limited GPU memory capacity. One common solution is to utilize the host memory as the external memory for swapping tensors in and out of GPU memory. However, the effectiveness of such tensor swapping can be impaired in data-parallel training systems due to contention on the shared PCIe channel to the host. In this paper, we propose the first large-model support framework that coordinates tensor movements among GPUs to alleviate PCIe channel contention. We design two types of coordination mechanisms. In the first mechanism, PCIe channel accesses from different GPUs are interleaved by selecting disjoint swapped-out tensors for each GPU. In the second method, swap commands are orchestrated to avoid contention. The effectiveness of these two methods depends on the model size and how often the GPUs synchronize on gradients. Experimental results show that compared to large-model support that is oblivious to channel contention, the proposed solution achieves average speedups of 38.3% to 31.8% when the memory footprint size is 1.33 to 2 times the GPU memory size.
items.abstract_zh: 随着深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型变得越来越深、越来越宽，训练大规模神经网络的主要挑战之一是克服有限的 GPU 内存容量。一种常见的解决方案是利用主机内存作为外部内存，用于将张量换入和换出 GPU 内存。然而，由于主机的共享 PCIe 通道上的争用，这种张量交换的有效性在数据并行训练系统中可能会受到损害。在本文中，我们提出了第一个大模型支持框架，用于协调 GPU 之间的张量移动，以缓解 PCIe 通道争用。我们设计了两种类型的协调机制。在第一种机制中，通过为每个 GPU 选择不相交的换出张量来交错来自不同 GPU 的 PCIe 通道访问。在第二种方法中，精心安排交换命令以避免争用。这两种方法的有效性取决于模型大小以及 GPU 同步梯度的频率。实验结果表明，与忽略通道争用的大模型支持相比，当内存占用大小为 GPU 内存大小的 1.33 至 2 倍时，所提出的解决方案实现了 38.3% 至 31.8% 的平均加速。

items.title: Ah-Q: Quantifying and Handling the Interference within a Datacenter from a System Perspective.
items.abstract: Interference among applications frequently occurs in a datacenter and significantly influences the cost-efficiency and the user experience. However, it is challenging for us to quantify the exact intensity of the interference that occurred in the overall system of a datacenter, because there are many concurrent applications in a datacenter, and their type can be either latency-critical (LC) and best-effort (BE). To address this issue, we present the Ah-Q which includes a theory and a strategy.First, we propose the "system entropy" (E<inf>S</inf>) theory to holistically and analytically quantify the interference in a datacenter to address this vital issue. The interference is caused by the scarcity of resources or/and the irrationality of scheduling. As more appropriate scheduling can compensate for resource scarcity, we derive the concept of "resource equivalence" to quantify the effectiveness of a resource scheduling strategy. We evaluate different resource scheduling strategies to validate the correctness and effectiveness of the proposed theory.Moreover, using the theory to eliminate interference, we propose a new resource scheduling strategy; i.e., ARQ, which dynamically allocates the isolated resources and the shared resources to simultaneously harvest the benefits of isolation and sharing. Our results show that compared to the state-of-the-art strategies (PARTIES and CLITE), ARQ is more effective to reduce the tail latency of the LC applications and to increase the IPC of the BE applications. Compared with PARTIES and CLITE, ARQ increases the yield (the ratio of satisfactory LC applications) by 25% and 20%, respectively; when the load is low, ARQ increases IPC of BE applications by 63.8% and 37.1%, respectively; ARQ reduces E<inf>S</inf> by 36.4% and 33.3%, respectively. The effectiveness of ARQ has saved resources significantly to achieve the same satisfactory overall user experience.
items.abstract_zh: 数据中心中应用程序之间的干扰频繁发生，严重影响成本效率和用户体验。然而，量化数据中心整个系统中发生的干扰的确切强度对我们来说是一个挑战，因为数据中心中有许多并发应用程序，并且它们的类型可以是延迟关键型（LC）和尽力而为型（BE）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了包括理论和策略的Ah-Q。首先，我们提出“系统熵”（E<inf>S</inf>）理论来全面、分析地量化数据中心中的干扰，以解决这一至关重要的问题。干扰是由资源稀缺或/和调度不合理引起的。由于更合适的调度可以弥补资源稀缺，因此我们推导出“资源等价”的概念来量化资源调度策略的有效性。我们对不同的资源调度策略进行了评估，验证了所提出理论的正确性和有效性。此外，利用该理论消除干扰，提出了一种新的资源调度策略；即ARQ，动态分配隔离资源和共享资源，同时获得隔离和共享的好处。我们的结果表明，与最先进的策略（PARTIES 和 CLITE）相比，ARQ 可以更有效地减少 LC 应用程序的尾部延迟并提高 BE 应用程序的 IPC。与PARTIES和CLITE相比，ARQ的良率（满意LC应用的比例）分别提高了25%和20%；低负载时，ARQ使BE应用的IPC分别提升63.8%和37.1%； ARQ 分别将 E<inf>S</inf> 降低了 36.4% 和 33.3%。 ARQ的有效性显着节省了资源，实现了同样令人满意的整体用户体验。

items.title: CARE: A Concurrency-Aware Enhanced Lightweight Cache Management Framework.
items.abstract: Improving cache performance is a lasting research topic. While utilizing data locality to enhance cache performance becomes more and more difficult, data access concurrency provides a new opportunity for cache performance optimization. In this work, we propose a novel concurrency-aware cache management framework that outperforms state-of-the-art locality-only cache management schemes. First, we investigate the merit of data access concurrency and pinpoint that reducing the miss rate may not necessarily lead to better overall performance. Next, we introduce the pure miss contribution (PMC) metric, a lightweight and versatile concurrency-aware indicator, to accurately measure the cost of each outstanding miss access by considering data concurrency. Then, we present CARE, a dynamic adjustable, concurrency-aware, low-overhead cache management framework with the help of the PMC metric. We evaluate CARE with extensive experiments across different application domains and show significant performance gains with the consideration of data concurrency. In a 4-core system, CARE improves IPC by 10.3% over LRU replacement. In 8 and 16-core systems where more concurrent data accesses exist, CARE outperforms LRU by 13.0% and 17.1%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 提高缓存性能是一个持久的研究课题。在利用数据局部性来提升缓存性能变得越来越困难的同时，数据访问并发性为缓存性能优化提供了新的机会。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的并发感知缓存管理框架，其性能优于最先进的仅局部缓存管理方案。首先，我们研究了数据访问并发性的优点，并指出降低丢失率不一定会带来更好的整体性能。接下来，我们引入纯粹未命中贡献（PMC）指标，这是一个轻量级且通用的并发感知指标，通过考虑数据并发性来准确衡量每个未完成未命中访问的成本。然后，我们在 PMC 指标的帮助下提出了 CARE，一个动态可调、并发感知、低开销的缓存管理框架。我们通过跨不同应用领域的广泛实验来评估 CARE，并在考虑数据并发性的情况下显示出显着的性能提升。在 4 核系统中，CARE 比 LRU 替换提高了 10.3% 的 IPC。在存在更多并发数据访问的 8 核和 16 核系统中，CARE 的性能分别优于 LRU 13.0% 和 17.1%。

items.title: AutoCAT: Reinforcement Learning for Automated Exploration of Cache-Timing Attacks.
items.abstract: The aggressive performance optimizations in modern microprocessors can result in security vulnerabilities. For example, timing-based attacks in processor caches can steal secret keys or break randomization. So far, finding cache-timing vulnerabilities is mostly performed by human experts, which is inefficient and laborious. There is a need for automatic tools that can explore vulnerabilities given that unreported vulnerabilities leave the systems at risk.In this paper, we propose AutoCAT, an automated exploration framework that finds cache timing-channel attack sequences using reinforcement learning (RL). Specifically, AutoCAT formulates the cache timing-channel attack as a guessing game between an attack program and a victim program holding a secret. This guessing game can thus be solved via modern deep RL techniques. AutoCAT can explore attacks in various cache configurations without knowing design details and under different attack and victim program configurations. AutoCAT can also find attacks to bypass certain detection and defense mechanisms. In particular, AutoCAT discovered StealthyStreamline, a new attack that is able to bypass performance counter-based detection and has up to a 71% higher information leakage rate than the state-of-the-art LRU-based attacks on real processors. AutoCAT is the first of its kind in using RL for crafting microarchitectural timing-channel attack sequences and can accelerate cache timing-channel exploration for secure microprocessor designs.
items.abstract_zh: 现代微处理器中积极的性能优化可能会导致安全漏洞。例如，处理器缓存中基于计时的攻击可以窃取密钥或破坏随机化。到目前为止，查找缓存定时漏洞主要由人类专家来完成，效率低且费力。鉴于未报告的漏洞使系统面临风险，因此需要能够探索漏洞的自动工具。在本文中，我们提出了 AutoCAT，一种自动探索框架，可使用强化学习 (RL) 查找缓存定时通道攻击序列。具体来说，AutoCAT 将缓存定时通道攻击表述为攻击程序和持有秘密的受害者程序之间的猜谜游戏。因此，这个猜谜游戏可以通过现代深度强化学习技术来解决。 AutoCAT 可以在不了解设计细节的情况下以及在不同的攻击和受害者程序配置下探索各种缓存配置中的攻击。 AutoCAT 还可以发现绕过某些检测和防御机制的攻击。特别是，AutoCAT 发现了 StealthyStreamline，这是一种新的攻击，能够绕过基于性能计数器的检测，并且与针对真实处理器的最先进的基于 LRU 的攻击相比，信息泄漏率高出 71%。 AutoCAT 是同类产品中第一个使用 RL 来制作微架构定时通道攻击序列的产品，并且可以加速安全微处理器设计的缓存定时通道探索。

items.title: MGC: Multiple-Gray-Code for 3D NAND Flash based High-Density SSDs.
items.abstract: QLC (4-bit-per-cell) and more-bit-per-cell 3D NAND flash memories are increasingly adopted in large storage systems. While achieving significant cost reduction, these memories face degraded performance and reliability issues. The industry has adopted two-step programming (TSP), rather than one-step programming, to perform fine-granularity program control and choose gray-code encoding, as well as LDPC (Low-Density Parity-Check Code) for error correction. Different flash manufacturers often integrate different gray-codes in their products, which exhibit different performance and reliability characteristics. Unfortunately, a fixed gray-code encoding design lacks the ability to meet the dynamic read and program performance requirements at both application and device levels.In this paper, we propose MGC, a multiple-gray-code encoding strategy, that adaptively chooses the best gray-code to meet the optimization goals at runtime. In particular, MGC first extracts the performance and reliability requirements based on application-level access patterns and detects the reliability degree of SSD. It then determines the appropriate gray-code to encode the data, either from host/user application or due to garbage collection, before writing the pages to the flash memory. MGC is integrated in FTL (flash translation layer) and enhances the flash controller to enable runtime gray-code arbitration. We evaluate the proposed MGC scheme. The results show that MGC achieves better performance and lifetime guarantee compared with state-of-the-arts and introduces little overhead.
items.abstract_zh: QLC（每单元 4 位）和每单元更多位 3D NAND 闪存越来越多地在大型存储系统中采用。在显着降低成本的同时，这些存储器面临着性能和可靠性下降的问题。业界已采用两步编程（TSP）而非一步编程来进行细粒度的程序控制，并选择格雷码编码以及LDPC（低密度奇偶校验码）进行纠错。不同的闪存制造商通常在其产品中集成不同的格雷码，从而表现出不同的性能和可靠性特征。不幸的是，固定格雷码编码设计缺乏满足应用程序和设备级别的动态读取和程序性能要求的能力。在本文中，我们提出了MGC，一种多格雷码编码策略，它自适应地选择最佳格雷码来满足运行时的优化目标。具体来说，MGC首先根据应用级访问模式提取性能和可靠性需求，并检测SSD的可靠性程度。然后，在将页面写入闪存之前，它会确定适当的格雷码来对来自主机/用户应用程序或由于垃圾收集的数据进行编码。 MGC 集成在 FTL（闪存翻译层）中，并增强闪存控制器以启用运行时格雷码仲裁。我们评估了所提出的 MGC 方案。结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，MGC 实现了更好的性能和生命周期保证，并且引入的开销很小。

items.title: Adrias: Interference-Aware Memory Orchestration for Disaggregated Cloud Infrastructures.
items.abstract: Workload co-location has become the de-facto approach for hosting applications in Cloud environments, leading, however, to interference and fragmentation in shared resources of the system. To this end, hardware disaggregation is introduced as a novel paradigm, that allows fine-grained tailoring of cloud resources to the characteristics of the deployed applications. Towards the realization of hardware disaggregated clouds, novel orchestration frameworks must provide additional knobs to manage the increased scheduling complexity.We present Adrias, a memory orchestration framework for disaggregated cloud systems. Adrias exploits information from low-level performance events and applies deep learning techniques to effectively predict the system state and performance of arriving workloads on memory disaggregated systems, thus, driving cognitive scheduling between local and remote memory allocation modes. We evaluate Adrias on a state-of-art disaggregated testbed and show that it achieves 0.99 and 0.942 R<sup>2</sup> score for system state and application’s performance prediction on average respectively. Moreover, Adrias manages to effectively utilize disaggregated memory, by offloading almost 1/3 of deployed applications with less than 15% performance overhead compared to a conventional local memory scheduling, while clearly outperforms naive scheduling approaches (random and round-robin), by providing up to ×2 better performance.
items.abstract_zh: 工作负载共置已成为云环境中托管应用程序的实际方法，但会导致系统共享资源的干扰和碎片化。为此，引入了硬件分解作为一种新颖的范例，允许根据已部署应用程序的特征对云资源进行细粒度的定制。为了实现硬件分解云，新颖的编排框架必须提供额外的旋钮来管理增加的调度复杂性。我们提出了 Adrias，一个用于分解云系统的内存编排框架。 Adrias 利用来自低级性能事件的信息，并应用深度学习技术来有效预测内存分类系统上到达的工作负载的系统状态和性能，从而推动本地和远程内存分配模式之间的认知调度。我们在最先进的分类测试平台上评估 Adrias，结果表明它的系统状态和应用程序性能预测平均分别达到 0.99 和 0.942 R<sup>2</sup> 分数。此外，与传统的本地内存调度相比，Adrias 能够以不到 15% 的性能开销卸载近 1/3 的已部署应用程序，从而有效地利用分解内存，同时通过提供高达 2 倍的更好性能，其性能明显优于简单的调度方法（随机和循环）。

items.title: Co-Designed Architectures for Modular Superconducting Quantum Computers.
items.abstract: Noisy, Intermediate Scale Quantum (NISQ) computers have reached the point where they can show the potential for quantum advantage over classical computing. Unfortunately, NISQ machines introduce sufficient noise that even for moderate size quantum circuits the results can be unreliable. We propose a collaboratively designed superconducting quantum computer using a Superconducting Nonlinear Asymmetric Inductive eLement (SNAIL) modulator. The SNAIL modulator is designed by considering both the ideal fundamental qubit gate operation while maximizing the qubit coupling capabilities. First, the SNAIL natively implements $\sqrt[n]{{{\text{iSWAP}}}}$ gates realized through proportionally scaled pulse lengths. This naturally includes $\sqrt {{\text{iSWAP}}} $, which provides an advantage over CNOT as a basis gate. Second, the SNAIL enables high-degree couplings that allow rich and highly parallel qubit connection topologies without suffering from frequency crowding. Building on our previously demonstrated SNAIL-based quantum state router we propose a quantum 4-ary tree and a hypercube inspired corral built from interconnected quantum modules. We compare their advantage in data movement based on necessary SWAP gates to the traditional lattice and heavy-hex lattice used in latest commercial quantum computers. We demonstrate the co-design advantage of our SNAIL-based machine with $\sqrt {{\text{iSWAP}}} $ basis gates and rich topologies against CNOT/heavy-hex and FSIM/lattice for 16-20 qubit and extrapolated designs circa 80 qubit architectures. We compare total circuit time and total gate count to understand fidelity for systems dominated by decoherence and control imperfections, respectively. Finally, we provide a gate duration sensitivity study on further decreasing the SNAIL pulse length to realize $\sqrt[n]{{{\text{iSWAP}}}}$ qubit systems to reduce decoherence times.
items.abstract_zh: 嘈杂的中规模量子（NISQ）计算机已经达到了可以显示出相对于经典计算的量子优势潜力的程度。不幸的是，NISQ 机器引入了足够的噪声，即使对于中等大小的量子电路，结果也可能不可靠。我们提出了一种使用超导非线性不对称感应元件（SNAIL）调制器协作设计的超导量子计算机。 SNAIL 调制器的设计既考虑了理想的基本量子位门操作，同时又最大化了量子位耦合能力。首先，SNAIL 本身实现了通过按比例缩放脉冲长度实现的 $\sqrt[n]{{{\text{iSWAP}}}}$ 门。这自然包括 $\sqrt {{\text{iSWAP}}} $，它比 CNOT 作为基础门具有优势。其次，SNAIL 可实现高度耦合，从而允许丰富且高度并行的量子位连接拓扑，而不会受到频率拥挤的影响。在我们之前演示的基于 SNAIL 的量子状态路由器的基础上，我们提出了一种量子四元树和一个由互连量子模块构建的超立方体启发的畜栏。我们将它们基于必要的交换门的数据移动优势与最新商用量子计算机中使用的传统晶格和重型六角晶格进行比较。我们展示了基于 SNAIL 的机器的协同设计优势，该机器具有 $\sqrt {{\text{iSWAP}}} $ 基础门和针对 CNOT/heavy-hex 和 FSIM/lattice 的丰富拓扑，适用于 16-20 量子位和大约 80 量子位架构的外推设计。我们比较总电路时间和总门数，以分别了解由退相干和控制缺陷主导的系统的保真度。最后，我们提供了门持续时间敏感性研究，进一步减少 SNAIL 脉冲长度，以实现 $\sqrt[n]{{{\text{iSWAP}}}}$ 量子位系统，从而减少退相干时间。

items.title: Speculative Register Reclamation.
items.abstract: Large number of in-flight instructions were envisioned two decades ago. They are finally happening now. While more in-flight instructions enable higher ILP and therefore better single-thread performance, it comes at a price. The price is larger structures within the core such as the physical register file. In this work, we propose to reduce register file size while maintaining (or even increasing) number of in-flight instructions. We leverage the insight that within loops, where most time is spent in general, most logical registers are redefined in the same or immediate next iteration. The physical registers allocated to most of these logical registers can thus be aggressively and speculatively released at redefinition instead of being released when the redefining instruction finally commits as in current designs. For correct mis-speculation recovery, only registers that are actually used (i.e used without prior redefinition) across iterations need to remain allocated beyond redefinition, leading to much reduced register file pressure. We show that using our design, register file sizes can be reduced by 50% while still achieving a 1.05x performance improvement over existing designs on a variety of applications even when other core resources are kept the same. The power consumption among various core structures in reduced by 26% on average. In addition, the performance improvement jumps to 1.14x when this reduction in register file size is complemented with an increase of other structures within the core.
items.abstract_zh: 二十年前就设想了大量的飞行指令。现在它们终于发生了。 While more in-flight instructions enable higher ILP and therefore better single-thread performance, it comes at a price.代价是内核内较大的结构，例如物理寄存器文件。在这项工作中，我们建议减少寄存器文件大小，同时保持（甚至增加）运行中指令的数量。我们利用这样的见解：在通常花费大部分时间的循环内，大多数逻辑寄存器在相同或紧邻的下一次迭代中重新定义。因此，分配给这些逻辑寄存器中的大多数的物理寄存器可以在重新定义时主动地和推测性地释放，而不是像当前设计中那样在重新定义指令最终提交时释放。为了正确的错误推测恢复，只有跨迭代实际使用的寄存器（即在没有事先重新定义的情况下使用）需要在重新定义之外保持分配，从而大大减少寄存器文件压力。我们表明，使用我们的设计，寄存器文件大小可以减少 50%，同时即使在其他核心资源保持不变的情况下，在各种应用上仍能实现比现有设计 1.05 倍的性能改进。各核心结构间功耗平均降低26%。此外，当寄存器文件大小的减小与内核内其他结构的增加相辅相成时，性能提升会跃升至 1.14 倍。

items.title: DeFiNES: Enabling Fast Exploration of the Depth-first Scheduling Space for DNN Accelerators through Analytical Modeling.
items.abstract: DNN workloads can be scheduled onto DNN accelerators in many different ways: from layer-by-layer scheduling to cross-layer depth-first scheduling (a.k.a. layer fusion, or cascaded execution). This results in a very broad scheduling space, with each schedule leading to varying hardware (HW) costs in terms of energy and latency. To rapidly explore this vast space for a wide variety of hardware architectures, analytical cost models are crucial to estimate scheduling effects on the HW level. However, state-of-the-art cost models are lacking support for exploring the complete depth-first scheduling space, for instance focusing only on activations while ignoring weights, or modeling only DRAM accesses while overlooking on-chip data movements. These limitations prevent researchers from systematically and accurately understanding the depth-first scheduling space.After formalizing this design space, this work proposes a unified modeling framework, DeFiNES, for layer-by-layer and depth-first scheduling to fill in the gaps. DeFiNES enables analytically estimating the hardware cost for possible schedules in terms of both energy and latency, while considering data access at every memory level. This is done for each schedule and HW architecture under study by optimally choosing the active part of the memory hierarchy per unique combination of operand, layer, and feature map tile. The hardware costs are estimated, taking into account both data computation and data copy phases. The analytical cost model is validated against measured data from a taped-out depth-first DNN accelerator, DepFiN, showing good modeling accuracy at the end-to-end neural network level. A comparison with generalized state-of-the-art demonstrates up to 10× better solutions found with DeFiNES.
items.abstract_zh: DNN 工作负载可以通过多种不同的方式调度到 DNN 加速器上：从逐层调度到跨层深度优先调度（也称为层融合或级联执行）。这导致了非常广泛的调度空间，每个调度都会导致不同的硬件 (HW) 成本（在能源和延迟方面）。为了快速探索各种硬件架构的广阔空间，分析成本模型对于估计硬件级别的调度效果至关重要。然而，最先进的成本模型缺乏对探索完整深度优先调度空间的支持，例如仅关注激活而忽略权重，或者仅对 DRAM 访问进行建模而忽略片上数据移动。这些限制阻碍了研究人员系统、准确地理解深度优先调度空间。在形式化这个设计空间后，本文提出了一个统一的建模框架 DeFiNES，用于逐层和深度优先调度，以填补空白。 DeFiNES 能够在能源和延迟方面分析估计可能的调度的硬件成本，同时考虑每个内存级别的数据访问。这是通过根据操作数、层和特征图块的独特组合来最佳选择存储器层次结构的活动部分来针对所研究的每个调度和硬件架构来完成的。估计硬件成本时会考虑数据计算和数据复制阶段。分析成本模型根据来自流片的深度优先 DNN 加速器 DepFiN 的测量数据进行了验证，显示出端到端神经网络级别的良好建模准确性。与一般最先进技术的比较表明，使用 DeFiNES 发现的解决方案好达 10 倍。

items.title: FinePack: Transparently Improving the Efficiency of Fine-Grained Transfers in Multi-GPU Systems.
items.abstract: Recent studies have shown that using fine-grained peer-to-peer (P2P) stores to communicate among devices in multi-GPU systems is a promising path to achieve strong performance scaling. In many irregular applications, such as graph algorithms and sparse linear algebra, small sub-cache line (4-32B) stores arise naturally when using the P2P paradigm. This is particularly problematic in multi-GPU systems because inter-GPU interconnects are optimized for bulk transfers rather than small operations. As a consequence, application developers either resort to complex programming techniques to work around this small transfer inefficiency or fall back to bulk inter-GPU DMA transfers that have limited performance scalability. We propose FinePack, a set of limited I/O interconnect and GPU hardware enhancements that enable small peer-to-peer stores to achieve interconnect efficiency that rivals bulk transfers while maintaining the simplicity of a peer-to-peer memory access programming model. Exploiting the GPU’s weak memory model, FinePack dynamically coalesces and compresses small writes into a larger I/O message that reduces link-level protocol overhead. FinePack is fully transparent to software and requires no changes to the GPU’s virtual memory system. We evaluate FinePack on a system comprising 4 Volta GPUs on a PCIe 4.0 interconnect to show FinePack improves interconnect efficiency for small peer-to-peer stores by 3×. This results in 4-GPU strong scaling performance 1.4× better than traditional DMA based multi-GPU programming and comes within 71% of the maximum achievable strong scaling performance.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，使用细粒度的点对点 (P2P) 存储在多 GPU 系统中的设备之间进行通信是实现强大性能扩展的一条有前途的途径。在许多不规则应用中，例如图算法和稀疏线性代数，使用 P2P 范例时自然会出现小型子缓存行（4-32B）存储。这在多 GPU 系统中尤其成问题，因为 GPU 间互连针对批量传输而不是小型操作进行了优化。因此，应用程序开发人员要么诉诸复杂的编程技术来解决这种传输效率低下的问题，要么退回到性能可扩展性有限的批量 GPU 间 DMA 传输。我们提出 FinePack，这是一组有限的 I/O 互连和 GPU 硬件增强功能，使小型对等存储能够实现与批量传输相媲美的互连效率，同时保持对等内存访问编程模型的简单性。 FinePack 利用 GPU 的弱内存模型，动态地将小写入合并并压缩为更大的 I/O 消息，从而减少链路级协议开销。 FinePack 对软件完全透明，无需更改 GPU 的虚拟内存系统。我们在 PCIe 4.0 互连上包含 4 个 Volta GPU 的系统上评估 FinePack，结果表明 FinePack 将小型点对点存储的互连效率提高了 3 倍。这使得 4-GPU 强扩展性能比传统的基于 DMA 的多 GPU 编程好 1.4 倍，并且在可实现的最大强扩展性能的 71% 以内。

items.title: Phloem: Automatic Acceleration of Irregular Applications with Fine-Grain Pipeline Parallelism.
items.abstract: Irregular applications are increasingly common in diverse domains, like graph analytics and sparse linear algebra. Accelerating these applications is challenging because of their unpredictable data reuse and control flow. Recent work has proposed hardware support for fine-grain pipeline parallelism, hiding long latencies by decoupling irregular applications into pipeline stages. However, this prior work requires programmers to manually decouple applications. This tedious and error-prone process limits the usefulness of such architectural support.We address this problem with Phloem, a compiler that automatically discovers and exploits pipeline parallelism in irregular applications. Prior compilers for pipeline parallelism target regular applications, which contain simple pipeline stages with known latencies and fixed buffering needs. Designing Phloem to target irregular applications, where these properties do not hold, requires treating their unique challenges as first-class considerations throughout its design. Phloem breaks down this complex transformation into a series of simple passes that together encode the insights that have been previously applied by hand, producing code that targets architectures with support for queue-based communication.We evaluate Phloem by generating efficient pipelines on a variety of irregular applications. Phloem’s contributions improve performance by 1.7× on average, approaching (and sometimes exceeding) the performance of manually optimized pipeline-parallel code. These results show that, for the first time, automatic parallelization for irregular applications is not only feasible, but also profitable.
items.abstract_zh: 不规则应用在不同领域中越来越常见，例如图分析和稀疏线性代数。由于数据重用和控制流程不可预测，加速这些应用程序具有挑战性。最近的工作提出了对细粒度管道并行性的硬件支持，通过将不规则应用程序解耦到管道阶段来隐藏长延迟。然而，这项先前的工作需要程序员手动解耦应用程序。这个繁琐且容易出错的过程限制了此类架构支持的实用性。我们使用 Phloem 来解决这个问题，Phloem 是一个编译器，可以自动发现和利用不规则应用程序中的管道并行性。先前的管道并行编译器针对常规应用程序，其中包含具有已知延迟和固定缓冲需求的简单管道阶段。设计韧皮部以针对不规则应用（这些特性不具备），需要在整个设计过程中将其独特的挑战作为首要考虑因素。韧皮部将这种复杂的转换分解为一系列简单的过程，这些简单的过程一起对之前手动应用的见解进行编码，生成针对支持基于队列的通信的架构的代码。我们通过在各种不规则应用程序上生成高效的管道来评估韧皮部。 Phloem 的贡献平均将性能提高了 1.7 倍，接近（有时甚至超过）手动优化的管道并行代码的性能。这些结果首次表明，不规则应用程序的自动并行化不仅是可行的，而且是有利可图的。

items.title: Dalorex: A Data-Local Program Execution and Architecture for Memory-bound Applications.
items.abstract: Applications with low data reuse and frequent irregular memory accesses, such as graph or sparse linear algebra workloads, fail to scale well due to memory bottlenecks and poor core utilization. While prior work with prefetching, decoupling, or pipelining can mitigate memory latency and improve core utilization, memory bottlenecks persist due to limited off-chip bandwidth. Approaches doing processing in-memory (PIM) with Hybrid Memory Cube (HMC) overcome bandwidth limitations but fail to achieve high core utilization due to poor task scheduling and synchronization overheads. Moreover, the high memory-per-core ratio available with HMC limits strong scaling.We introduce Dalorex, a hardware-software co-design that achieves high parallelism and energy efficiency, demonstrating strong scaling with >16,000 cores when processing graph and sparse linear algebra workloads. Over the prior work in PIM, both using 256 cores, Dalorex improves performance and energy consumption by two orders of magnitude through (1) a tile-based distributed-memory architecture where each processing tile holds an equal amount of data, and all memory operations are local; (2) a task-based parallel programming model where tasks are executed by the processing unit that is co-located with the target data; (3) a network design optimized for irregular traffic, where all communication is one-way, and messages do not contain routing metadata; (4) novel traffic-aware task scheduling hardware that maintains high core utilization; and (5) a data-placement strategy that improves work balance.This work proposes architectural and software innovations to provide the greatest scalability to date for running graph algorithms while still being programmable for other domains.
items.abstract_zh: 数据重用率低和频繁的不规则内存访问的应用程序（例如图形或稀疏线性代数工作负载）由于内存瓶颈和核心利用率低而无法很好地扩展。虽然之前的预取、解耦或流水线工作可以减轻内存延迟并提高核心利用率，但由于片外带宽有限，内存瓶颈仍然存在。使用混合内存立方体 (HMC) 进行内存处理 (PIM) 的方法克服了带宽限制，但由于任务调度和同步开销不佳而无法实现高核心利用率。此外，HMC 提供的高内存每核比率限制了强大的扩展能力。我们引入了 Dalorex，这是一种硬件-软件协同设计，可实现高并行性和能源效率，在处理图形和稀疏线性代数工作负载时展示了超过 16,000 个内核的强大扩展能力。与之前的 PIM 工作（均使用 256 个内核）相比，Dalorex 通过以下方式将性能和能耗提高了两个数量级：(1) 基于图块的分布式内存架构，其中每个处理图块保存等量的数据，并且所有内存操作都是本地的； (2)基于任务的并行编程模型，其中任务由与目标数据位于同一位置的处理单元执行； (3) 针对不规则流量优化的网络设计，其中所有通信都是单向的，并且消息不包含路由元数据； (4)新颖的流量感知任务调度硬件，保持高核心利用率； (5) 改善工作平衡的数据放置策略。这项工作提出了架构和软件创新，为运行图算法提供迄今为止最大的可扩展性，同时仍然可以为其他领域编程。

items.title: AVGI: Microarchitecture-Driven, Fast and Accurate Vulnerability Assessment.
items.abstract: We propose AVGI, a new Statistical Fault Injection (SFI)-based methodology, which delivers orders of magnitude faster assessment of the Architectural Vulnerability Factor (AVF) of a microprocessor chip, while retaining the high accuracy of SFI. The proposed methodology is based on three key insights about the way that faults traverse complex out-of-order microarchitectures: (1) the distribution of the different ways that hardware faults manifest at the software (i.e., the first effects of faults to the software layer) is relatively uniform across workloads, (2) the final effects of faults in a specific hardware structure (i.e., their effect on the program execution) is relatively uniform for different workloads and depends on the distribution of the above fault manifestations, and (3) the majority of first manifestations occur in certain timeframe from the fault occurrence, which is significantly shorter than the complete execution of the workload, and depends on the type of hardware structure. Based on these insights, the proposed AVGI methodology accurately estimates the complete cross-layer vulnerability (i.e., AVF) for every hardware structure in fine granularity (SDCs and Crashes). Our experimental analysis shows that preserving high levels of accuracy, the proposed AVF assessment methodology is up to 337x and 440x faster than an accelerated exhaustive SFI, for two different microarchitectures of 64-bit Armv8 and 32-bit Armv7 CPU models, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 AVGI，这是一种基于统计故障注入 (SFI) 的新方法，可将微处理器芯片的架构漏洞因子 (AVF) 的评估速度提高几个数量级，同时保留 SFI 的高精度。所提出的方法基于关于故障穿越复杂无序微体系结构的方式的三个关键见解：（1）硬件故障在软件上表现的不同方式的分布（即故障对软件层的第一个影响）在工作负载中相对均匀，（2）特定硬件结构中的故障的最终影响（即它们对程序执行的影响）对于不同的工作负载来说相对均匀，并且取决于上述故障表现的分布， (3)大多数首次表现发生在故障发生后的某个时间范围内，该时间范围明显短于工作负载的完整执行，并且取决于硬件结构的类型。基于这些见解，所提出的 AVGI 方法以细粒度（SDC 和崩溃）准确估计每个硬件结构的完整跨层漏洞（即 AVF）。我们的实验分析表明，在保持高精度的情况下，对于 64 位 Armv8 和 32 位 Armv7 CPU 模型的两种不同微架构，所提出的 AVF 评估方法分别比加速穷举 SFI 快 337 倍和 440 倍。

items.title: VAQUERO: A Scratchpad-based Vector Accelerator for Query Processing.
items.abstract: Database Management Systems (DBMS) have be-come an essential tool for industry and research and are often a significant component of data centers. There have been many efforts to accelerate DBMS application performance. One of the most explored techniques is the use of vector processing. Unfortunately, conventional vector architectures have not been able to exploit the full potential of DBMS acceleration.In this paper, we present VAQUERO, our Scratchpad-based Vector Accelerator for QUEry pROcessing. VAQUERO improves the efficiency of vector architectures for DBMS operations such as data aggregation and hash joins featuring lookup tables. Lookup tables are significant contributors to the performance bottlenecks in DBMS processing suffering from insufficient ISA support in the form of scatter-gather instructions. VAQUERO introduces a novel Advanced Scratchpad Memory specifically designed with two mapping modes — direct- and associative-mode. These map-ping modes enable VAQUERO to accelerate real-world databases with workload sizes that significantly exceed the scratchpad memory capacity. Additionally, the associative-mode allows to use VAQUERO with DBMS operators that use hashed keys, e.g. hash-join and hash-aggregate. VAQUERO has been designed considering general DBMS algorithm requirements instead of being based on a particular database organization. For this reason, VAQUERO is capable to accelerate DBMS operators for both row- and column-oriented databases.In this paper, we evaluate the efficiency of VAQUERO using two highly optimized popular open-source DBMS, namely the row-based PostgreSQL and column-based MonetDB. We imple-mented VAQUERO at the RTL level and prototype it, by performing Place&Route, at the 7nm technology node. VAQUERO incurs a modest 0.15% area overhead compared with an Intel Ice Lake processor. Our evaluation shows that VAQUERO significantly outperforms PostgreSQL and MonetDB by 2.09× and 3.32× respectively, when processing operators and queries from the TPC-H benchmark.
items.abstract_zh: 数据库管理系统 (DBMS) 已成为工业和研究的重要工具，并且通常是数据中心的重要组成部分。人们已经做出了许多努力来提高 DBMS 应用程序的性能。探索最多的技术之一是矢量处理的使用。不幸的是，传统的向量架构无法充分发挥 DBMS 加速的全部潜力。在本文中，我们介绍了 VAQUERO，这是我们用于查询处理的基于 Scratchpad 的向量加速器。 VAQUERO 提高了 DBMS 操作的向量架构的效率，例如数据聚合和具有查找表的散列连接。由于分散-聚集指令形式的 ISA 支持不足，查找表是造成 DBMS 处理性能瓶颈的重要因素。 VAQUERO 推出了一种新颖的高级暂存器存储器，专门设计有两种映射模式 - 直接模式和关联模式。这些映射模式使 VAQUERO 能够加速实际数据库，其工作负载大小大大超过暂存器内存容量。此外，关联模式允许将 VAQUERO 与使用散列键的 DBMS 运算符一起使用，例如哈希连接和哈希聚合。 VAQUERO 的设计考虑了一般 DBMS 算法要求，而不是基于特定的数据库组织。因此，VAQUERO 能够加速面向行和列的数据库的 DBMS 操作。在本文中，我们使用两种高度优化的流行开源 DBMS（即基于行的 PostgreSQL 和基于列的 MonetDB）来评估 VAQUERO 的效率。我们在 RTL 级别实现了 VAQUERO，并通过在 7nm 技术节点执行布局和布线来对其进行原型设计。与 Intel Ice Lake 处理器相比，VAQUERO 的面积开销仅为 0.15%。我们的评估表明，在处理来自 TPC-H 基准的运算符和查询时，VAQUERO 的性能分别显着优于 PostgreSQL 和 MonetDB 2.09 倍和 3.32 倍。

items.title: CHOPPER: A Compiler Infrastructure for Programmable Bit-serial SIMD Processing Using Memory in DRAM.
items.abstract: Increasing interests in Bit-serial SIMD Processing-Using-DRAM (PUD) architectures amplify the needs for a compiler to automate code generation, credited to their ultra-wide SIMD width and reduction of data movements. The state-of-the-art Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures (1) only provide assembly SIMD programming interfaces, which heavily saddles with programmers to exploit the ultra-wide SIMD width on these architectures; and (2) encapsulate 1-bit operations into multi-bit abstractions, which incurs a granularity mismatch and restricts the optimization space to minimize data movements.We present CHOPPER, a new compiler infrastructure to make Bit-serial SIMD PUD more programmable and efficient. For the better programmability, the design of CHOPPER (1) exploits bit-slicing compilers to enable automatic memory allocation and code generation, from naturally-expressive codes (i.e. similar to Parallel Haskell) into the "SIMD-Within-A-Register"-style codes; and (2) introduces a new abstraction called "Virtual Code Emitter", to make Bit-serial SIMD PUD architecture exploit Memory-Level Parallelism (i.e. Bank or Subarray) more effectively. For the better efficiency, we propose three novel optimizations for CHOPPER to better exploit the potentials of Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures, which (1) minimize the amount of intra-subarray data movements; and (2) mitigate the overheads of spilling data outside Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures. These optimizations can greatly improve the overall efficiency of Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures. We also discuss (1) the limitations of the current CHOPPER; and (2) the potentials of CHOPPER for other types of Processing-In-Memory architectures.We evaluate CHOPPER by hosting it on three state-of-the-art Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures. We compare CHOPPER-generated codes against the state-of-the-art hands-tuned codes for Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures. We highlight that, averaged across 16 real-world workloads from 4 PUD-friendly application domains, CHOPPER achieves (A) 1.20X, 1.29X and 1.26X speedup when data can fit within DRAM subarrays; and (B) 12.61X, 9.05X and 9.81X speedup when data need to spill to the secondary storage, on Ambit [50], ELP2IM [56] and SIMDRAM [22], compared with hands-tuned codes using the state-of-the-art methodology [22] for Bit-serial SIMD PUD architectures. These performance benefits also accompany with a great reduction of Lines-of-Codes (LoC) in CHOPPER (i.e. by 4.3X less LoCs for hands-tuning a single subarray, and >10<sup>3</sup>X less for hands-tuning all subarrays in a rank). We also perform breakdown and sensitivity studies of CHOPPER, to better understand its source benefits and examine its robustness under various architectural features.
items.abstract_zh: 人们对使用 DRAM 进行位串行 SIMD 处理 (PUD) 架构的兴趣日益浓厚，因此加大了对编译器自动生成代码的需求，这要归功于其超宽 SIMD 宽度和数据移动的减少。最先进的位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构 (1) 仅提供汇编 SIMD 编程接口，这给程序员在这些架构上利用超宽 SIMD 宽度带来了沉重负担； (2) 将 1 位操作封装成多位抽象，这会导致粒度不匹配并限制优化空间以最大限度地减少数据移动。我们提出了 CHOPPER，一种新的编译器基础架构，使位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 更加可编程和高效。为了更好的可编程性，CHOPPER (1) 的设计利用位切片编译器来实现自动内存分配和代码生成，从自然表达的代码（即类似于 Parallel Haskell）到“SIMD-Within-A-Register”风格的代码； (2) 引入了一种称为“虚拟代码发射器”的新抽象，以使位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构更有效地利用内存级并行性（即 Bank 或 Subarray）。为了提高效率，我们对 CHOPPER 提出了三种新颖的优化，以更好地利用位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构的潜力，其中（1）最大限度地减少子阵列内数据移动的数量； (2) 减轻在位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构之外溢出数据的开销。这些优化可以极大地提高位串行SIMD PUD​​架构的整体效率。我们还讨论了（1）当前CHOPPER的局限性； (2) CHOPPER 对于其他类型的内存处理架构的潜力。我们通过将 CHOPPER 托管在三个最先进的位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构上来评估 CHOPPER。我们将 CHOPPER 生成的代码与位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构的最先进的手动调整代码进行比较。我们强调，根据来自 4 个 PUD 友好应用程序域的 16 个实际工作负载的平均值，当数据可以容纳在 DRAM 子阵列中时，CHOPPER 实现了 (A) 1.20 倍、1.29 倍和 1.26 倍的加速； (B) 当数据需要溢出到辅助存储时，在 Ambit [50]、ELP2IM [56] 和 SIMDRAM [22] 上，与使用针对位串行 SIMD PUD​​ 架构的最先进方法 [22] 进行手动调整的代码相比，速度提高了 12.61 倍、9.05 倍和 9.81 倍。这些性能优势还伴随着 CHOPPER 中代码行数 (LoC) 的大幅减少（即手动调整单个子阵列的 LoC 减少 4.3 倍，手动调整队列中所有子阵列的 LoC 减少 > 10<sup>3</sup>X）。我们还对 CHOPPER 进行故障和敏感性研究，以更好地了解其源优势并检查其在各种架构特征下的稳健性。

items.title: On Consistency for Bulk-Bitwise Processing-in-Memory.
items.abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures allow software to explicitly initiate computation in the memory. This effectively makes PIM operations a new class of memory operations, alongside standard memory operations (e.g., load, store). For software correctness, it is crucial to have ordering rules for a PIM operation with other PIM operations and other memory operations, i.e., a consistency model that takes into account PIM operations is vital. To the best of our knowledge, little attention to PIM operation consistency has been given in existing works. In this paper, we focus on a specific PIM approach, named bulk-bitwise PIM. In bulk-bitwise PIM, large bitwise operations are performed directly and stored in the memory array. We show that previous solutions for the related topic of maintaining coherency of bulk-bitwise PIM have broken the host native consistency model and prevent any guaranteed correctness. As a solution, we propose and evaluate four consistency models for bulk-bitwise PIM, from strict to relaxed. Our designs also preserve coherency between PIM and the host processor. Evaluating the proposed designs’ performance with a gem5 simulation, using the YCSB short-range scan benchmark and TPC-H queries, shows that the run time overhead of guaranteeing correctness is at most 6%, and in many cases the run time is even improved. The hardware overhead of our design is less than 0.22%.
items.abstract_zh: Processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures allow software to explicitly initiate computation in the memory. This effectively makes PIM operations a new class of memory operations, alongside standard memory operations (e.g., load, store).对于软件正确性来说，PIM 操作与其他 PIM 操作和其他内存操作的排序规则至关重要，即考虑 PIM 操作的一致性模型至关重要。 To the best of our knowledge, little attention to PIM operation consistency has been given in existing works. In this paper, we focus on a specific PIM approach, named bulk-bitwise PIM. In bulk-bitwise PIM, large bitwise operations are performed directly and stored in the memory array.我们表明，先前针对维护批量按位 PIM 一致性的相关主题的解决方案已经破坏了主机本机一致性模型并阻止了任何保证的正确性。 As a solution, we propose and evaluate four consistency models for bulk-bitwise PIM, from strict to relaxed. Our designs also preserve coherency between PIM and the host processor.使用 YCSB 短程扫描基准和 TPC-H 查询，通过 gem5 模拟评估所提出的设计的性能，结果表明保证正确性的运行时间开销最多为 6%，并且在许多情况下运行时间甚至得到了改善。 The hardware overhead of our design is less than 0.22%.

items.title: AB-ORAM: Constructing Adjustable Buckets for Space Reduction in Ring ORAM.
items.abstract: Ring ORAM (Oblivious RAM) is a secure primitive that mitigates the large performance degradation of ORAM through reduced online memory bandwidth demand, i.e., the number of memory accesses at servicing a real memory request. Ring ORAM requires 4× or more of the protected data space to enable the optimization and thus presents high capacity pressure on modern memory systems. While recent studies strive to reduce its space consumption through bucket compaction, the large space consumption remains a major design challenge for Ring ORAM.In this paper, we propose AB-ORAM to reduce the space capacity demand in Ring ORAM. AB-ORAM identifies two inefficient use of memory space in Ring ORAM: (i) accessed blocks hold useless data until the next reshuffle operation; and (ii) large buckets provide a diminishing performance benefit for tree levels close to the leaves. AB-ORAM then proposes two schemes to exploit the optimization opportunities, respectively. Specifically, it reclaims accessed blocks early by allocating them to buckets that need a reshuffle; and shrinks the bucket size for tree level close to the leaves for a better space/performance trade-off. We evaluate the proposed AB-ORAM design and compare it to the state-of-the-art. Our results show that AB-ORAM achieves an average of 36% space reduction over the state-of-the-art while introducing very low performance overhead.
items.abstract_zh: Ring ORAM（Oblivious RAM）是一种安全原语，它通过减少在线内存带宽需求（即服务实际内存请求时的内存访问次数）来缓解 ORAM 的大幅性能下降。 Ring ORAM 需要 4 倍或更多的受保护数据空间才能实现优化，因此对现代存储系统带来了很高的容量压力。虽然最近的研究努力通过桶压缩来减少其空间消耗，但大量的空间消耗仍然是Ring ORAM的主要设计挑战。在本文中，我们提出AB-ORAM来减少Ring ORAM的空间容量需求。 AB-ORAM identifies two inefficient use of memory space in Ring ORAM: (i) accessed blocks hold useless data until the next reshuffle operation; and (ii) large buckets provide a diminishing performance benefit for tree levels close to the leaves. AB-ORAM then proposes two schemes to exploit the optimization opportunities, respectively. Specifically, it reclaims accessed blocks early by allocating them to buckets that need a reshuffle; and shrinks the bucket size for tree level close to the leaves for a better space/performance trade-off. We evaluate the proposed AB-ORAM design and compare it to the state-of-the-art.我们的结果表明，AB-ORAM 与最先进的技术相比，平均减少了 36% 的空间，同时引入了非常低的性能开销。

items.title: Mix-GEMM: An efficient HW-SW Architecture for Mixed-Precision Quantized Deep Neural Networks Inference on Edge Devices.
items.abstract: Deep Neural Network (DNN) inference based on quantized narrow-precision integer data represents a promising research direction toward efficient deep learning computations on edge and mobile devices. On one side, recent progress of Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) frameworks aimed at improving the accuracy of extremely quantized DNNs allows achieving results close to Floating-Point 32 (FP32), and provides high flexibility concerning the data sizes selection. Unfortunately, current Central Processing Unit (CPU) architectures and Instruction Set Architectures (ISAs) targeting resource-constrained devices present limitations on the range of data sizes supported to compute DNN kernels.This paper presents Mix-GEMM, a hardware-software co-designed architecture capable of efficiently computing quantized DNN convolutional kernels based on byte and sub-byte data sizes. Mix-GEMM accelerates General Matrix Multiplication (GEMM), representing the core kernel of DNNs, supporting all data size combinations from 8- to 2-bit, including mixed-precision computations, and featuring performance that scale with the decreasing of the computational data sizes. Our experimental evaluation, performed on representative quantized Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), shows that a RISC-V based edge System-on-Chip (SoC) integrating Mix-GEMM achieves up to 1.3 TOPS/W in energy efficiency, and up to 13.6 GOPS in throughput, gaining from 5.3× to 15.1× in performance over the OpenBLAS GEMM frameworks running on a commercial RISC-V based edge processor. By performing synthesis and Place and Route (PnR) of the enhanced SoC in Global Foundries 22nm FDX technology, we show that Mix-GEMM only accounts for 1% of the overall area consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 基于量化窄精度整数数据的深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理代表了在边缘和移动设备上进行高效深度学习计算的一个有前景的研究方向。一方面，量化感知训练 (QAT) 框架的最新进展旨在提高极度量化的 DNN 的准确性，可以实现接近浮点 32 (FP32) 的结果，并在数据大小选择方面提供高度灵活性。不幸的是，当前针对资源受限设备的中央处理单元 (CPU) 架构和指令集架构 (ISA) 对计算 DNN 内核所支持的数据大小范围存在限制。本文提出了 Mix-GEMM，这是一种软硬件协同设计的架构，能够根据字节和子字节数据大小高效计算量化的 DNN 卷积内核。 Mix-GEMM 可加速通用矩阵乘法 (GEMM)，代表 DNN 的核心内核，支持从 8 位到 2 位的所有数据大小组合，包括混合精度计算，并具有随着计算数据大小的减小而扩展的性能。我们在代表性量化卷积神经网络 (CNN) 上进行的实验评估表明，集成 Mix-GEMM 的基于 RISC-V 的边缘片上系统 (SoC) 可实现高达 1.3 TOPS/W 的能效和高达 13.6 GOPS 的吞吐量，与运行在基于商用 RISC-V 的边缘处理器上的 OpenBLAS GEMM 框架相比，性能提高了 5.3 倍至 15.1 倍。通过对 Global Foundries 22nm FDX 技术中的增强型 SoC 进行综合和布局布线 (PnR)，我们发现 Mix-GEMM 仅占总面积消耗的 1%。

items.title: Leveraging Domain Information for the Efficient Automated Design of Deep Learning Accelerators.
items.abstract: Deep learning accelerators are important tools for feeding the growing demand for deep learning applications. The automated design of such accelerators—which is important for reducing development costs—can be viewed as a search over a vast and complex design space that consists of all possible accelerators and all the possible software that could run on them. Unfortunately, this search is complicated by the existence of many ordinal and categorical values, which are critical to explore for the ultimate design but are not handled well by existing search techniques.This paper presents a technique for efficiently searching this space by injecting domain information—in this case information about hardware/software (HW/SW) co-design—into the automated search process. Specifically, this paper introduces a novel Bayesian optimization framework called daBO (domain-aware BO) that accepts domain information as input, including those describing ordinal and categorical values.This paper also introduces Spotlight, a design tool based on daBO, and this paper empirically shows that Spotlight produces accelerator designs and software schedules that are orders of magnitude better than those created by the state-of-the-art. For example, for the ResNet-50 deep learning model, Spotlight produces a HW/SW configuration that reduces delay by 135× over the configuration produced by ConfuciuX, a state-of-the-art HW/SW co-design tool, and Spotlight reduces energy-delay product (EDP) by 44× over an Eyeriss-like accelerator, which is an edge-scale hand-designed accelerator. In the realm of cloud-scale accelerators, Spotlight reduces the EDP of a scaled-up Eyeriss-like accelerator by 23×. Our evaluation shows that Spotlight benefits from the efficiency of daBO, which allows Spotlight to identify accelerator designs and software schedules that prior work cannot identify.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习加速器是满足深度学习应用不断增长的需求的重要工具。此类加速器的自动化设计对于降低开发成本非常重要，可以被视为对庞大而复杂的设计空间的搜索，该空间由所有可能的加速器以及可以在其上运行的所有可能的软件组成。不幸的是，这种搜索由于存在许多序数和分类值而变得复杂，这些值对于探索最终设计至关重要，但现有的搜索技术无法很好地处理。本文提出了一种通过将域信息（在本例中为有关硬件/软件 (HW/SW) 协同设计的信息）注入自动搜索过程来有效搜索该空间的技术。具体来说，本文介绍了一种名为 daBO（领域感知 BO）的新型贝叶斯优化框架，该框架接受领域信息作为输入，包括描述序数值和分类值的信息。本文还介绍了基于 daBO 的设计工具 Spotlight，本文根据经验表明，Spotlight 生成的加速器设计和软件调度比最先进的加速器设计和软件调度要好几个数量级。例如，对于 ResNet-50 深度学习模型，Spotlight 生成的硬件/软件配置比最先进的硬件/软件协同设计工具 ConfuciuX 生成的配置减少了 135 倍的延迟，并且与类似 Eyeriss 的加速器（一种边缘规模手工设计的加速器）相比，Spotlight 将能量延迟积 (EDP) 减少了 44 倍。在云规模加速器领域，Spotlight 将扩大的类似 Eyeriss 的加速器的 EDP 降低了 23 倍。我们的评估表明，Spotlight 受益于 daBO 的效率，这使得 Spotlight 能够识别先前工作无法识别的加速器设计和软件时间表。

items.title: Logical/Physical Topology-Aware Collective Communication in Deep Learning Training.
items.abstract: Training is an important aspect of deep learning to enable network models to be deployed. To scale training, multiple GPUs are commonly used with data parallelism to exploit the additional GPU compute and memory capacity. However, one challenge in scalability is the collective communication between GPUs. In this work, we propose to accelerate the AllReduce collective. AllReduce communication is often based on a logical topology (e.g., ring or tree algorithms) that is mapped to a physical topology or the physical connectivity between the nodes. In this work, we propose a logical/physical topology-aware collective communication that we refer to as C-Cube architecture – Chaining Collective Communication with Computation. C-Cube exploits the opportunity to overlap or chain different phases of collective communication as well as forward computation in a tree algorithm AllReduce. We exploit the communication pattern in a logical tree topology to overlap the different phases of communication. Since ordering is maintained in the tree collective algorithm, we propose gradient queuing to enable chaining of communication with forward computation to accelerate overall performance while having no impact on training accuracy. We also exploit the physical topology characteristics to further improve the performance, including proposing detour connections for collective communication while leveraging the additional connectivity to enable a double-tree C-Cube implementation. We implement a C-Cube proof-of-concept on a real system (8-GPU NVIDIA DGX-1) and show C-Cube results in performance improvement in communication performance compared to non-overlapped tree algorithms as well as overall performance.
items.abstract_zh: 训练是深度学习的一个重要方面，可以部署网络模型。为了扩展训练，通常将多个 GPU 与数据并行结合使用，以利用额外的 GPU 计算和内存容量。然而，可扩展性方面的一大挑战是 GPU 之间的集体通信。在这项工作中，我们建议加速 AllReduce 集体。 AllReduce 通信通常基于映射到物理拓扑或节点之间的物理连接的逻辑拓扑（例如环或树算法）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种逻辑/物理拓扑感知的集体通信，我们将其称为 C-Cube 架构——将集体通信与计算链接起来。 C-Cube 利用重叠或链接集体通信的不同阶段以及树算法 AllReduce 中的前向计算的机会。我们利用逻辑树拓扑中的通信模式来重叠通信的不同阶段。由于排序是在树集体算法中维护的，因此我们提出梯度排队，以实现与前向计算的通信链接，从而加速整体性能，同时不影响训练准确性。我们还利用物理拓扑特征来进一步提高性能，包括建议集体通信的绕行连接，同时利用额外的连接来实现双树 C-Cube 实现。我们在真实系统（8-GPU NVIDIA DGX-1）上实施了 C-Cube 概念验证，并展示了与非重叠树算法相比，C-Cube 在通信性能以及整体性能方面的性能改进。

items.title: FlowGNN: A Dataflow Architecture for Real-Time Workload-Agnostic Graph Neural Network Inference.
items.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have recently exploded in popularity thanks to their broad applicability to graph-related problems such as quantum chemistry, drug discovery, and high energy physics. However, meeting demand for novel GNN models and fast inference simultaneously is challenging due to the gap between developing efficient accelerators and the rapid creation of new GNN models. Prior art focuses on accelerating specific classes of GNNs, such as Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN), but lacks generality to support a wide range of existing or new GNN models. Furthermore, most works rely on graph pre-processing to exploit data locality, making them unsuitable for real-time applications. To address these limitations, in this work, we propose a generic dataflow architecture for GNN acceleration, named FlowGNN, which is generalizable to the majority of message-passing GNNs. The contributions are three-fold. First, we propose a novel and scalable dataflow architecture, which generally supports a wide range of GNN models with message-passing mechanism. The architecture features a configurable dataflow optimized for simultaneous computation of node embedding, edge embedding, and message passing, which is generally applicable to all models. We also propose a rich library of model-specific components. Second, we deliver ultra-fast real-time GNN inference without any graph pre-processing, making it agnostic to dynamically changing graph structures. Third, we verify our architecture on the Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA board and measure the on-board end-to-end performance. We achieve a speed-up of up to 24–254× against CPU (6226R) and 1.3–477× against GPU (A6000) (with batch sizes 1 through 1024); we also outperform the SOTA GNN accelerator I-GCN by 1.26× speedup and 1.55× energy efficiency over four datasets. Our implementation code and on-board measurement are publicly available on GitHub.<sup>1</sup>
items.abstract_zh: 由于图神经网络（GNN）在量子化学、药物发现和高能物理等图相关问题上的广泛适用性，图神经网络（GNN）最近迅速普及。然而，由于开发高效加速器和快速创建新 GNN 模型之间存在差距，同时满足新型 GNN 模型和快速推理的需求具有挑战性。现有技术专注于加速特定类别的 GNN，例如图卷积网络 (GCN)，但缺乏支持各种现有或新的 GNN 模型的通用性。此外，大多数工作依赖于图预处理来利用数据局部性，这使得它们不适合实时应用程序。为了解决这些限制，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于 GNN 加速的通用数据流架构，名为 FlowGNN，它可推广到大多数消息传递 GNN。贡献有三倍。首先，我们提出了一种新颖且可扩展的数据流架构，该架构通常支持具有消息传递机制的各种 GNN 模型。该架构具有针对节点嵌入、边缘嵌入和消息传递的同时计算进行优化的可配置数据流，通常适用于所有模型。我们还提出了丰富的特定于模型的组件库。其次，我们提供超快的实时 GNN 推理，无需任何图形预处理，使其与动态变化的图形结构无关。第三，我们在 Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA 板上验证我们的架构并测量板载端到端性能。我们针对 CPU (6226R) 实现了高达 24-254 倍的加速，针对 GPU (A6000) 实现了高达 1.3-477 倍的加速（批量大小为 1 到 1024）；我们还在四个数据集上超越了 SOTA GNN 加速器 I-GCN 1.26 倍的加速比和 1.55 倍的能源效率。我们的实现代码和板载测量可在 GitHub 上公开获取。<sup>1</sup>

items.title: Turbo: SmartNIC-enabled Dynamic Load Balancing of µs-scale RPCs.
items.abstract: Online services are decomposed into fine-grained software components that communicate over the network using fine-grained Remote Procedure Calls (RPCs). Inter-server communication often exhibits patterns of wide RPC fan-outs between software tiers, raising the well-known tail at scale effect and necessitating mechanisms that curb long response tail latencies. When handling µs-scale RPCs, request distribution across the cores of multicore servers is a major determinant of the resulting tail latency. Software approaches for inter-core RPC balancing introduce considerable overheads, throttling a server’s peak throughput. On the other hand, existing NIC-based hardware mechanisms ameliorate software and inter-core synchronization overheads, but result in inter-core load imbalance that leaves significant performance improvement headroom.We introduce Turbo, a hardware on-NIC load-balancing mechanism that achieves near-optimal inter-core load distribution for the most fine-grained, light-tailed RPCs with service times of only a couple of µs. We implement Turbo on a programmable NIC and evaluate it on a range of different service time distributions and with a high-performance Key-Value store. Compared to hardware NIC-based mechanisms that statically spread load across cores, Turbo boosts throughput under a 99% latency Service Level Objective (SLO) of 30× the service time by up to 5×, and by up to 95× for a more aggressive 10× SLO target.
items.abstract_zh: 在线服务被分解为细粒度的软件组件，这些组件使用细粒度的远程过程调用 (RPC) 通过网络进行通信。服务器间通信通常表现出软件层之间广泛的 RPC 扇出模式，从而提高了众所周知的大规模尾部效应，并需要抑制长响应尾部延迟的机制。在处理 µs 级 RPC 时，跨多核服务器核心的请求分布是导致尾部延迟的主要决定因素。用于核心间 RPC 平衡的软件方法会带来相当大的开销，从而限制服务器的峰值吞吐量。另一方面，现有的基于 NIC 的硬件机制改善了软件和内核间同步开销，但导致内核间负载不平衡，从而留下了显着的性能改进空间。我们引入了 Turbo，一种硬件 NIC 负载平衡机制，可为最细粒度、轻尾的 RPC 实现近乎最佳的内核间负载分配，服务时间仅为几微秒。我们在可编程 NIC 上实现 Turbo，并在一系列不同的服务时间分布和高性能键值存储上对其进行评估。与静态地跨内核分散负载的基于硬件 NIC 的机制相比，Turbo 在 30 倍服务时间的 99% 延迟服务级别目标 (SLO) 下将吞吐量提高了多达 5 倍，对于更积极的 10 倍 SLO 目标则提高了高达 95 倍。

items.title: HIRAC: A Hierarchical Accelerator with Sorting-based Packing for SpGEMMs in DNN Applications.
items.abstract: The state-of-the-art deep neural network (DNN) models use pruning to avoid over-fitting and reduce the number of parameters. In order to improve storage and computational efficiency, only nonzero elements are stored, and their locations are encoded into a sparse format. Sparse General Matrix Multiplication (SpGEMM) is the kernel computation of DNN-based applications. One challenge of computing SpGEMM is to avoid multiplying zero elements while keeping hardware utilization high in hardware accelerators that consist of processing element (PE) arrays. Prior work tackling this challenge typically requires complex interconnection networks, which adds high area and energy costs.This work proposes a HW/SW co-design architecture to compute SpGEMM efficiently without requiring complex interconnection networks. A novel fast packing algorithm, SorPack, is proposed to convert a sparse matrix into a dense matrix that increases PE utilization. The key idea is to sort columns and rows inside each submatrix based on the number of nonzero elements. The goal is to keep the partial sums that need to be added together close to each other, hence can be added locally and avoid the use of complex interconnection networks. In addition, a new tile-based hierarchical architecture, HIRAC, is proposed to provide a scalable system that maximizes the parallelism of the PEs. The HIRAC architecture consists of a novel PE array design and interconnection network tailored for DNN applications. The SorPack algorithm complements the HIRAC to further improve hardware utilization and overall system performance. Based on the evaluation results, HIRAC achieves an average of 3.2× speedup on a single layer of DNN as compared to the state-of-the-art sparse DNN accelerator SIGMA. In addition, HIRAC has a 9.5% area reduction and a 32% power reduction as compared to SIGMA. An end-to-end evaluation on a DNN model shows an 8.2× runtime reduction over the TPU.
items.abstract_zh: The state-of-the-art deep neural network (DNN) models use pruning to avoid over-fitting and reduce the number of parameters.为了提高存储和计算效率，仅存储非零元素，并将它们的位置编码为稀疏格式。 Sparse General Matrix Multiplication (SpGEMM) is the kernel computation of DNN-based applications.计算 SpGEMM 的一项挑战是避免乘以零元素，同时在由处理元素 (PE) 阵列组成的硬件加速器中保持较高的硬件利用率。先前应对这一挑战的工作通常需要复杂的互连网络，这会增加较高的面积和能源成本。这项工作提出了一种硬件/软件协同设计架构，可以在不需要复杂互连网络的情况下高效计算 SpGEMM。 A novel fast packing algorithm, SorPack, is proposed to convert a sparse matrix into a dense matrix that increases PE utilization. The key idea is to sort columns and rows inside each submatrix based on the number of nonzero elements.目标是保持需要相加的部分和彼此接近，因此可以在本地相加并避免使用复杂的互连网络。此外，还提出了一种新的基于分片的分层架构 HIRAC，以提供可最大化 PE 并行性的可扩展系统。 The HIRAC architecture consists of a novel PE array design and interconnection network tailored for DNN applications. The SorPack algorithm complements the HIRAC to further improve hardware utilization and overall system performance.根据评估结果，与最先进的稀疏 DNN 加速器 SIGMA 相比，HIRAC 在单层 DNN 上平均实现 3.2 倍的加速。 In addition, HIRAC has a 9.5% area reduction and a 32% power reduction as compared to SIGMA. An end-to-end evaluation on a DNN model shows an 8.2× runtime reduction over the TPU.

items.title: Securator: A Fast and Secure Neural Processing Unit.
items.abstract: Securing deep neural networks (DNNs) is a problem of significant interest since an ML model incorporates high-quality intellectual property, features of data sets painstakingly collated by mechanical turks, and novel methods of training on large cluster computers. Sadly, attacks to extract model parameters are on the rise, and thus designers are being forced to create architectures for securing such models. State-of-the-art proposals in this field take the deterministic memory access patterns of such networks into cognizance (albeit partially), group a set of memory blocks into a tile, and maintain state at the level of tiles (to reduce storage space). For providing integrity guarantees (tamper avoidance), they don’t propose any significant optimizations, and still maintain block-level state.We observe that it is possible to exploit the deterministic memory access patterns of DNNs even further, and maintain state information for only the current tile and current layer, which may comprise a large number of tiles. This reduces the storage space, reduces the number of memory accesses, increases performance, and simplifies the design without sacrificing any security guarantees. The key techniques in our proposed accelerator architecture, Securator, are to encode memory access patterns to create a small HW-based tile version number generator for a given layer, and to store layer-level MACs. We completely eliminate the need for having a MAC cache and a tile version number store (as used in related work). We show that using intelligently-designed mathematical operations, these structures are not required. By reducing such overheads, we show a speedup of 20.56% over the closest competing work.
items.abstract_zh: 确保深度神经网络 (DNN) 的安全是一个备受关注的问题，因为 ML 模型融合了高质量的知识产权、机械土耳其人精心整理的数据集特征以及在大型集群计算机上训练的新颖方法。遗憾的是，提取模型参数的攻击正在增加，因此设计人员被迫创建用于保护此类模型的架构。该领域最先进的建议将此类网络的确定性内存访问模式纳入认知（尽管是部分的），将一组内存块分组为图块，并在图块级别维护状态（以减少存储空间）。为了提供完整性保证（避免篡改），他们没有提出任何重大的优化，并且仍然保持块级状态。我们观察到，可以进一步利用 DNN 的确定性内存访问模式，并仅维护当前图块和当前层的状态信息，其中可能包含大量图块。这减少了存储空间，减少了内存访问次数，提高了性能，并简化了设计，而不会牺牲任何安全保证。我们提出的加速器架构 Securator 中的关键技术是对内存访问模式进行编码，以便为给定层创建一个基于硬件的小型图块版本号生成器，并存储层级 MAC。 We completely eliminate the need for having a MAC cache and a tile version number store (as used in related work). We show that using intelligently-designed mathematical operations, these structures are not required. By reducing such overheads, we show a speedup of 20.56% over the closest competing work.

items.title: Memory-Efficient Hashed Page Tables.
items.abstract: Conventional radix-tree page tables have scalability challenges, as address translation following a TLB miss potentially requires multiple memory accesses in sequence. An alternative is hashed page tables (HPTs) where, conceptually, address translation needs only one memory access. Traditionally, HPTs have been shunned due to high costs of handling conflicts and other limitations. However, recent advances have made HPTs compelling. Still, a major issue in HPT designs is their requirement for substantial contiguous physical memory.This paper addresses this problem. To minimize HPTs’ contiguous memory needs, it introduces the Logical to Physical (L2P) Table and the use of Dynamically-Changing Chunk Sizes. These techniques break down the HPT into discontiguous physical-memory chunks. In addition, the paper also introduces two techniques that minimize HPTs’ total memory needs and, indirectly, reduce the memory contiguity requirements. These techniques are In-place Page Table Resizing and Per-way Resizing. We call our complete design Memory-Efficient HPTs (ME-HPTs). Compared to state-of-the-art HPTs, ME-HPTs: (i) reduce the contiguous memory allocation needs by 92% on average, and (ii) improve the performance by 8.9% on average. For the two most demanding workloads, the contiguous memory requirements decrease from 64MB to 1MB. In addition, compared to state-of-the-art radix-tree page tables, ME-HPTs achieve an average speedup of 1.23× (without huge pages) and 1.28× (with huge pages).
